recommendations.title: A Million Miles Away
recommendations.overview: The life of engineer and former NASA astronaut José M. Hernández, the first migrant farmworker to go to space.

recommendations.title: Griff the Invisible
recommendations.overview: Griff, office worker by day, superhero by night, has his world turned upside down when he meets Melody, a beautiful young scientist who shares his passion for the impossible.

recommendations.title: The Frame
recommendations.overview: Two strangers find their lives colliding in an impossible way. Alex is a methodical cargo thief working for a dangerous cartel. Sam is a determined paramedic trying to save the world while running from her past.

recommendations.title: Gravity
recommendations.overview: Dr Ryan Stone, an engineer on her first space mission, and Matt Kowalski, an astronaut on his final expedition, have to survive in space after they are hit by debris while spacewalking.

recommendations.title: EVA
recommendations.overview: In 2041, humans live side-by-side with robots and androids. A well-known cybernetic engineer, Alex Garel, returns to his hometown to create a new model of robot child.

recommendations.title: Passengers
recommendations.overview: A spacecraft traveling to a distant colony planet and transporting thousands of people has a malfunction in its sleep chambers. As a result, two passengers are awakened 90 years early.

recommendations.title: The Shadow Effect
recommendations.overview: A young man's life is turned upside down when his violent dreams begin to blend with reality.

recommendations.title: Down by Love
recommendations.overview: A man, a woman. A prison director, his inmate. An impossible love, a true story.

recommendations.title: Stowaway
recommendations.overview: A three-person crew on a mission to Mars faces an impossible choice when an unplanned passenger jeopardizes the lives of everyone on board.

recommendations.title: Robot Dreams
recommendations.overview: A lonely dog's friendship with his robot companion takes a sad turn when an unexpected malfunction forces him to abandon Robot at the beach. Will Dog ever meet Robot again?
